Category: Process & Execution

Bug Description: When executing the container process with args ['sh', '-c', 'echo process-path-13; command -v sh'], crun should perform a proper $PATH lookup before exec'ing. The current buggy behavior may not resolve the path correctly or may skip PATH lookup.
